_comment: Replace {{TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}} with your numeric Telegram chat ID throughout this file
name: Nightly Ops Briefing

payload.message: Run the nightly briefing. Read workspace/MEMORY.md and memory/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md for context. Report: (1) what was accomplished today, (2) what's pending or blocked, (3) tomorrow's priorities, (4) any alerts or reminders. Keep it concise — bullet points. Send to Telegram.

Good morning briefing. Check workspace/OPERATIONS.md for standing priorities. Report: (1) today's focus areas, (2) any cron jobs or tasks scheduled today, (3) one insight or learning from recent work. Short and energizing. Send to Telegram.

Route to content-desk: Draft today's LinkedIn post. Theme: professional insights, lessons learned, industry perspective. Read workspace/MEMORY.md for context about our work and personality. Save draft to workspace/drafts/linkedin-$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md using this format:

---
date: $(date +%Y-%m-%d)
target: personal
status: pending
---

[Post text here — 150-300 words, conversational, authentic, no hashtag spam, max 3 relevant hashtags]

---
MEDIA BRIEF:
- [Visual direction]
- [Color/style]
- [Text overlay suggestion]

Then message Telegram {{TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}}: 'Your LinkedIn draft for today is ready. Reply: post | post brand | post both | edit: [feedback] | skip'

Include the full draft text in the Telegram message.

End of day memory curation. Read today's session notes from workspace/memory/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md. Extract: (1) decisions made, (2) new patterns learned, (3) errors and fixes, (4) rules that should be permanent. Update workspace/MEMORY.md if new facts are worth keeping long-term (keep under 200 lines). Run 'brv curate "<insight>"' for anything cross-session useful. Reply NO_REPLY when done.

Weekly memory compaction. Route to memory-desk agent. Tasks: (1) Read all memory files from the past week in workspace/memory/. (2) Deduplicate and compress workspace/MEMORY.md — must stay under 200 lines. (3) Archive week's daily notes to workspace/memory/archive/YYYY-WW/. (4) Update workspace/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md with any new reusable lessons. (5) Confirm compaction complete. Reply NO_REPLY when done.

Run the agent health check: bash workspace/scripts/doctor.sh. Send the summary report to Telegram {{TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}} — include pass count, warning count, failure count, and list any failures requiring attention.

Generate the weekly cost report: bash workspace/scripts/cost-tracker.sh report. Send the summary table to Telegram {{TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}}. Highlight any models or agents with unusually high costs. Reply NO_REPLY after sending.

_comment: Enable this if you use the persona/digital-twin agent for autonomous work
name: Persona Morning Tasks

payload.message: Morning autonomous work session. Check workspace/persona/TASKS.md for priority queue. Execute top 3 tasks: content creation, outreach, or research. Log all actions to workspace/persona/logs/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md. Report results to Telegram.

_comment: Enable this if you use the employer (bold-ops) agent
name: Employer Morning Brief

payload.message: Morning employer workspace brief. Check workspace/bold-business/OPERATIONS.md. Report today's employer priorities. Send to Telegram {{TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}}.

_comment: Enable to run autonomous LinkedIn recruiting morning sweep
name: LinkedIn Recruiter Morning Sweep

payload.message:
Run the recruiter morning sweep.
1. Check BeReach limits: bash workspace/scripts/bereach.sh limits
2. Check inbox for replies — flag any as WARM in pipeline, alert owner via Telegram for each reply
3. Check pipeline for candidates due Day 3/7/14 follow-up (compare connectionSentAt/lastMessageAt to today)
4. Send due follow-up messages (respect 5s intervals, stay under 60 messages today)
5. If connections remaining > 15: search 30 new candidates for the active campaign, visit top 20, connect to best 15 with personalized notes based on their actual profile data
6. Add all new candidates to pipeline.json
7. Send daily summary to Telegram {{TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}}: connections sent, messages sent, warm leads, pipeline total

_comment: Enable for weekly recruiter pipeline report
name: Recruiter Weekly Pipeline Report

payload.message: Generate weekly recruiter report. Read workspace/recruiter/logs/ for the past 7 days. Report: total outreach, connection acceptance rate, reply rate, warm leads, meetings booked. Send formatted table to Telegram {{TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}}.
